---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: list
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
---

# My Projects

This section presents academic, technical, and business projects that reflect my development in strategy, analytics, teamwork, and digital skills.

::: {.callout-note}
Each project demonstrates practical learning outcomes from university studies and real world problem solving.
:::
## Quick Snapshot

| Achievement | Value |
|---|---|
| Countries Worked In | 2 |
| Academic Projects | 5+ |
| Certifications | 6+ |
| Languages | 3 |
| Career Ambition | Global |
